reviews.comment:
Ya pasé mi experiencia y la borraron,ayer parte como siempre lo hago hace ya 12 años de vida idea vuelta a cordoba, cargue nafta exelente atención en la playa,pero en el bar un desastre no hay ningún cuidado por,la pandemia, pedí 2 cafés y 2 medialunas pague y voy a buscar a la ventana que tienen para tal fin,en ese momento veo LIS cafés servidos y a una de las empleadas que agarra un vaso de la mesada lo enjuaga solo con el chorro de la canilla y lo seca con el delantal que lleva puesto le hago ver que eso no es sanitizar los elementos para servir,entonces tira el agua que habia servido lo vuelve a enjuagar bajo el chorro de la canilla y ahora lo seca con un trapo que había sobre una de las mesadas ,se acerca la,cajera al escuchar mi queja ,me dice que tengo razón y sirve en otros dos casos distintos,estarán sanitizados como los otros?señores no me parece serio y además muy peligrosa esta actitud,espero no lo borren porque el próximo va un mail al A CA

(Translated by Google)
I already had my experience and they deleted it. Yesterday, as I always do (I've been doing this for 12 years now), I headed back to Cordoba. I filled up with gas; the service at the pump was excellent, but the bar was a disaster. There's no care being taken regarding the pandemic. I ordered two coffees and two croissants, paid, and went to get them at the window they have for that purpose. At that moment, I saw the coffees being served and one of the employees taking a glass from the counter, rinsing it only under the tap and drying it with her apron. I pointed out that this isn't sanitizing the serving utensils. Then she poured out the water she had used, rinsed it again under the tap, and dried it with a rag that was on one of the counters. The cashier came over when she heard my complaint, told me I was right, and did the same thing in two other cases. Were those sanitized like the others? This attitude doesn't seem serious to me, and it's also very dangerous. I hope they don't delete it because next time I'll be in trouble. mail to A CA
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5NGYyNmJnEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente ubicación con fácil acceso desde la autopista a la altura de San Pedro. Se trata de un ACA que es histórico. Excelentes instalaciones al servicio de todos los viajeros y descuentos para los socios del ACA. Aceptan todos los medios de pago. El servicio de cafetería es excelente y a precios por demás prudentes. Vale la pena hacer un alto.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent location with easy access from the highway near San Pedro. This is a historic ACA. Excellent facilities for all travelers and discounts for ACA members. All payment methods are accepted. The cafeteria service is excellent and the prices are extremely reasonable. It's worth a stop.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5N3RUNGJ3EAE
